collapse_threshold_change.behavior: Live collapsed rail preview remains active, but collapse now only occurs when dragged close to the collapsed rail.

honest_caveats: CFS is descriptive, not predictive, in the current prototype.
Presentation-derived school utilization is not official capacity data.
School capacity scoring is not active.

nav_visual_styling_changes.pattern: Dark glass workspace-mode selector with stable border, luminous active accent lines, and no hover layout shift
nav_visual_styling_changes.performance_notes: CSS-only visual treatment; no heavy animation or particles.

school_utilization_layer.caveat: Presentation-derived utilization from SY 2024-2025 planning maps. Needs verification against official enrollment/capacity data.
school_utilization_layer.map_rendering: Dedicated cfs-school-utilization-zones-layer with transparent attendance-zone polygons colored by utilization_class.
school_utilization_layer.popup_behavior: Clicking a school utilization zone opens an informational card; it does not select a parcel.

performance_safeguards: Methodology mode does not mount SceneView.
School utilization zones are not fetched unless the layer is enabled.
School utilization layer uses a dedicated graphics layer and clears only that layer on filter changes.
Geometry is simplified server-side before return.
No map labels are rendered for school zones; details are click-only.
Layer controls do not refetch APIs while off.
remaining_known_issues: School utilization seed remains preliminary until verified official enrollment and capacity data arrive.
School utilization zones are source-context polygons and do not perform parcel selection.
Official school capacity scoring remains disabled by design.
